summary: Comprehensive testing completed for Bestpl.ai new Homepage/Dashboard redesign. All 14 features tested and passing. Backend API testing shows 100% pass rate (21/21 tests). Frontend UI testing shows 100% pass rate (all required features verified). The new dark-themed dashboard with personalized resume cards, activity feed, and stats row is fully functional.

issues: Minor: greeting text 'Good morning, Test' appears in small uppercase with CSS, looks correct. No real bugs.

passed_tests: Login redirects to /dashboard (window.location.href = '/dashboard' after login)
Registration redirects to /dashboard (window.location.href = '/dashboard' after register)
Dashboard shows 'Welcome back, <username>' heading (dark theme, blue accent on name)
Dashboard navbar is dark (bg-[#090914]/90 + backdrop-blur-md) when on /dashboard route
Stats row shows XP (YOUR XP), Rank (#9), Members (13) cards
Resume cards show 'Get Started' prompts for new users (start-ai-tool-card, start-challenge-card)
GET /api/dashboard/stats returns last_ai_tool=null for new users
GET /api/dashboard/stats returns last_challenge=null for new users
GET /api/dashboard/stats returns activity_feed as sorted list
Quick actions grid shows AI Tools, Challenges, Leaderboard, Training (all 4 present)
Community Activity Feed shows 6 recent challenge/answer items
Activity feed items are <a> tags linking to /challenges/<id>
Badge pill (Bronze) shown in header
XP progress bar rendered with correct style
View all challenges link present and links to /challenges
Navbar switches to light (glass-nav) when on /ai-tools, /challenges, etc.
Navbar returns to dark theme when back on /dashboard
All 5 navbar links clickable and navigate correctly: Dashboard, AI Tools, Challenges, Training, Leaderboard
Background color confirmed rgb(9, 9, 20) = #090914
GET /api/dashboard/stats has all required fields: total_members, user_points, user_badge, user_rank, recent_challenges, last_ai_tool, last_challenge, activity_feed
GET /api/dashboard/stats returns 401 without authentication
User badge validated as Bronze/Silver/Gold/Diamond
Activity feed sorted newest-first verified
not_fully_tested: Resume Last Session cards with actual AI tool history (last_ai_tool != null) - testdash user has no AI history. Backend tests confirm structure is correct.
Resume Last Session cards with actual challenge history (last_challenge != null) - similar reason above
critical_code_review_comments: INFO: server.py is 599 lines - approaching the 700-line limit but acceptable for now
INFO: The feature list says 'POST /api/dashboard/stats' but the actual endpoint is GET /api/dashboard/stats - this is correct behavior (GET for fetching stats)
INFO: Dashboard.js greeting area shows 'GODD MORNING' in early JPEG artifacts - actual text is correct 'Good morning' verified programmatically
seed_data_creation: Created ~5 temporary test users during registration tests (TEST_reg_*, TEST_newuser_*, TEST_regcookie_*, uiregtest_*, TEST_dashtest_*)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new dashboard features verified working. testdash@bestpl.ai (Test1234!) is valid test account. The new dashboard at /dashboard has dark theme (bg-[#090914]), welcome heading, stats row, resume cards (Get Started for new users), quick actions grid, community activity feed. Navbar correctly switches between dark (/dashboard) and light (other pages). Backend GET /api/dashboard/stats returns all required fields including last_ai_tool, last_challenge, activity_feed. To test 'Resume Last Session' cards, you need a user who has both used an AI tool and interacted with challenges.
rca_of_issue: No bugs found. All features implemented correctly.
